'''''Niven''''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] that supplied the makeshift [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] assembly area before its destruction by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces.

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Niven'' was possibly named after science fiction author [[Wikipedia:Larry Niven|Larry Niven]] (a friend and collaborator with [[Steven Barnes]]).

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
